dynamo_component_router_input_sequence_t.description: Input sequence length in tokens observed at the router

dynamo_component_router_inter_token_late.description: Average inter-token latency observed at the router

dynamo_component_router_kv_hit_rate.description: Predicted KV cache hit rate at routing time (0.0-1.0)

dynamo_component_router_kv_transfer_esti.description: Upper-bound estimation of KV cache transfer latency in disaggregated serving (prefill_complete to first_token)

dynamo_component_router_output_sequence_.description: Output sequence length in tokens observed at the router

dynamo_component_router_requests.description: Total number of requests processed by the router

dynamo_component_router_shared_cache_bey.description: Shared cache blocks beyond device overlap for the selected worker

dynamo_component_router_shared_cache_hit.description: Fraction of request blocks found in the shared KV cache (0.0-1.0)

dynamo_component_router_time_to_first_to.description: Time to first token observed at the router

dynamo_frontend_active_requests.description: Number of requests currently being handled by the frontend, from HTTP handler entry to response completion

dynamo_frontend_event_loop_delay_seconds.description: Event loop delay canary: drift from 10ms sleep (seconds)

dynamo_frontend_model_context_length.description: Maximum context length in tokens for a worker serving the model

dynamo_frontend_model_kv_cache_block_siz.description: KV cache block size in tokens for a worker serving the model

dynamo_frontend_model_max_num_batched_to.description: Maximum number of batched tokens for a worker serving the model

dynamo_frontend_model_max_num_seqs.description: Maximum number of sequences for a worker serving the model

dynamo_frontend_model_migration_limit.description: Maximum number of request migrations allowed for the model

dynamo_frontend_model_total_kv_blocks.description: Total KV cache blocks available for a worker serving the model

dynamo_frontend_output_tokens.description: Total number of output tokens generated (updates in real-time)

dynamo_frontend_queued_requests.description: Number of requests in HTTP processing queue

dynamo_frontend_requests.description: Total number of LLM requests processed

dynamo_frontend_stage_requests.description: Number of requests currently in the given pipeline stage

dynamo_frontend_time_to_first_token_seco.description: Time to first token in seconds

dynamo_request_plane_queue_seconds.description: Time from generate() entry to send_request() (seconds)

dynamo_request_plane_roundtrip_ttft_seco.description: Time from send_request() to first response item (seconds)

dynamo_router_overhead_block_hashing_ms.description: Time spent computing block hashes in milliseconds

dynamo_router_overhead_indexer_find_matc.description: Time spent in indexer find_matches in milliseconds

dynamo_router_overhead_scheduling_ms.description: Time spent in scheduler worker selection in milliseconds

dynamo_router_overhead_seq_hashing_ms.description: Time spent computing sequence hashes in milliseconds

dynamo_router_overhead_shared_cache_quer.description: Time spent querying the shared KV cache in milliseconds

dynamo_router_overhead_total_ms.description: Total routing overhead per request in milliseconds

dynamo_tokio_alive_tasks.description: Number of alive tasks in the runtime

dynamo_tokio_blocking_queue_depth.description: Number of tasks in the blocking thread pool queue

dynamo_tokio_budget_forced_yield.description: Number of times tasks were forced to yield after exhausting budget

dynamo_tokio_global_queue_depth.description: Number of tasks in the runtime global queue

dynamo_tokio_worker_busy_ratio.description: Worker busy ratio (0-1) as integer mill ratio; >950 = saturated

dynamo_tokio_worker_local_queue_depth.description: Number of tasks in worker local queue

dynamo_tokio_worker_overflow_count.description: Total number of times worker local queue overflowed

dynamo_tokio_worker_park_count.description: Total number of times worker has parked

dynamo_tokio_worker_steal_count.description: Total number of tasks stolen by worker

dynamo_transport_tcp_bytes_received.description: Total bytes received by TCP request client

dynamo_transport_tcp_bytes_sent.description: Total bytes sent by TCP request client

dynamo_transport_tcp_errors.description: Total TCP request errors (send failure or timeout)
